title: Bybit WebSocket adapter

context_files.reason: Pure functions and immutability for data transformation

acceptance_criteria: Connects to Bybit WebSocket (Spot and Linear)
Subscribes to ticker, trades, orderbook, and kline topics
Emits typed events matching KuCoin interface (for adapter interchangeability)
